open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time backward copy in l_memmove

pending_local_branches.desc: fix: l_strtod/l_strtof set errno=ERANGE on overflow/underflow. Add L_ERANGE=34. Register test_img.c in coverage manifest. Add ERANGE tests (save errno before TEST_ASSERT because l_write resets it!). Linux CI PASS.
ci: add actions/cache@v4 apt caching and --no-install-recommends to arm/riscv/wasi CI jobs.

notes: safeoutputs MCP tools consistently unavailable (multiple runs). PR #122 (memmove perf) still open. DONE THIS RUN (run 24271486174): Completed Task 10 (strtod/strtof ERANGE fix) and Task 4 (CI apt caching). Both branches committed locally but cannot be pushed. KEY INSIGHT: When writing errno tests, save errno BEFORE TEST_ASSERT because l_write/l_puts resets l_last_errno=0 on success. Next run: recreate these branches from patches in patches.md and push/create PRs. Monthly summary #123 not updated due to tool unavailability.

fix-strtod-erange.l_os.h_l_erange: After L_ENOTEMPTY  39 add: /// Result out of range\n#define L_ERANGE     34
fix-strtod-erange.l_os.h_alias: After #define ENOTEMPTY L_ENOTEMPTY add: #  undef ERANGE\n#  define ERANGE   L_ERANGE
fix-strtod-erange.l_strtod_fix: Replace 'if (exp > 308) exp = 308;' + loop with: int ecap=(exp>400)?400:exp; double epow=1.0; for(int i=0;i<ecap;i++)epow*=10.0; double val_before=val; if(eneg)val/=epow; else val*=epow; if(__builtin_isinf(val)||(val==0.0&&val_before!=0.0))l_set_errno(L_ERANGE);
fix-strtod-erange.l_strtof_fix: Same as strtod but ecap=100, float types, __builtin_isinf(val) for float
fix-strtod-erange.tests: In test_strtod_atof and test_strtof: l_set_errno(0); double v=l_strtod('1e9999',0); int saved=l_errno(); TEST_ASSERT(__builtin_isinf(v),...); TEST_ASSERT(saved==L_ERANGE,...);

ci_apt_cache.change: Add 'Cache apt packages (arm/riscv/wasi)' steps using actions/cache@v4 with path=/var/cache/apt/archives/*.deb before install steps. Add --no-install-recommends to all apt-get install commands.
